description: Define prioritized, traceable functional and non-functional requirements for a product or feature. Use when discovery findings, stakeholder input, or raw notes must be turned into a reviewed requirements set before architecture, planning, or implementation.

results.query: We already interviewed eight customers for our new approvals feature. Turn that into a clear set of functional and non-functional requirements with priorities.
We have market analysis and user personas already. Now define the system requirements for the first release and make them testable.
帮我把这个 B2B 报销流程产品的需求整理清楚，区分 P0/P1/P2，并补上性能、安全、审计这些非功能需求。
I need help documenting acceptance criteria for this already-defined requirement set.
请根据这些用户痛点，写出系统 shall 做什么、什么不做，以及每条需求的来源和优先级。
Design the API for our invoicing service. We already know the requirements.
Write the PRD for this feature using the approved requirements doc.
实现这个导出功能吧，代码放在 services/exporter 目录，先写测试再动实现。
Review this spec draft and tell me if the user stories are clear enough.
Compare SOC 2 and ISO 27001 for me. I want to understand the difference.
